data.title: India Post GDS Recruitment 2026: Online Application for 40,889 Branch Postmaster Posts
data.jobDescription:
📬 India Post Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS) Recruitment 2026

Department of Posts, India is inviting online applications for Gramin Dak Sevak (GDS), Branch Postmaster (BPM), and Assistant Branch Postmaster (ABPM) posts across various circles. Selection will be based purely on merit (marks obtained in board exams).

📊 Selection Procedure

No written test or interview will be conducted. System-generated merit lists will be published for each postal circle based on candidates' class 10th/12th percentages.

About the Department of Posts, India Recruitment Drive

Apply for the latest India Post GDS Recruitment 2026: Online Application for 40,889 Branch Postmaster Posts position at Department of Posts, India. This role offers a fantastic opportunity to build a career in India at a leading organization. Qualified candidates matching the criteria below are encouraged to apply online immediately.

Role Overview & Eligibility Criteria

  • Hiring Company: Department of Posts, India
  • Job Profile: India Post GDS Recruitment 2026: Online Application for 40,889 Branch Postmaster Posts
  • Location: Pan India / Remote
  • Salary Package: Rs. 12,000 - 29,380 monthly allowances
  • Experience Required: Freshers & Experienced Candidates
  • Eligible Batches: 2026, 2025, 2024, 2023 graduates

Selection Process & How to Apply

The selection process at Department of Posts, India generally consists of an initial online assessment, technical screening rounds, and a final HR evaluation. To submit your application, click the official apply link on this page, register with your updated details, and upload your resume.

Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

Q1: What is the last date to apply?

A: The application window is open for a limited period. Candidates should submit their applications as early as possible before the link is closed by the company.

Q2: Does this job allow remote work?

A: Please verify the job type specification on this page. Remote roles allow working from home, whereas hybrid/on-site roles require office attendance.
data.eligibility: 10th or 12th pass certificate with passing marks in Mathematics and English. Knowledge of local language of the applied circle is mandatory.
data.whyJoin: Direct entry into government service based on academic records, local posting, and standard work hours.
data.description: Department of Posts GDS Recruitment 2026. Online registration links for 40,889 post office vacancies. Check state-wise circle lists and cut-offs.
data.howToApply:
1. Register on the portal indiapostgdsonline.gov.in.
  2. Enter registration details, choose your postal circle, and fill in marks.
  3. Upload matriculation marksheets and caste certificates.
  4. Pay the fee of Rs. 100 and submit.
